description:
Recto: short note in Hebrew written by Yosef b. Yiṣḥaq and Menaḥem b. Shemuʾel Kohen regarding the writing of a geṭ and the tearing of the ketubba. 

Verso: trousseau list in relation to the marriage of [...] b. David and Naẓar bt. Yosef, mentioning several household items, such as head scarves, a pot, and a menora. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
